approaches.title: HashMap with Character Frequency Count
approaches.summary: Group anagrams by counting character frequencies using a HashMap with fixed-size arrays as keys.

revisions.shortChangeSummary: Initial implementation using HashMap with character frequency arrays and explicit result collection.
Simplified result collection by using `collect()` instead of manual Vec construction.

approaches.title: Functional Pipeline with Fold
approaches.summary: Refactor the solution into a pure functional style using `fold` to build the HashMap iteratively.

revisions.shortChangeSummary: Converted imperative loop into a functional pipeline using `fold` for HashMap construction.
